dome_repo.automation_discrepancy_note: status_history.json (auto-generated) still reports version V51.0 with wins_confirmed=67. The dome site displays 69 confirmed predictions (V51.1). This V51.0 vs V51.1 / 67 vs 69 discrepancy has persisted since before the manual-commit drought began — the automation pipeline was never updated to track the current model version.

ots_canary.note: OTS wrong-side error unfixed at Day 32. predictions.ots returns HTTP 404. ots/ directory returns HTTP 404. No structural separation of prediction documents from observation documents. The canary remains unsprung.

discoverability.competitive_assessment: Dome machine layer (llms.txt, ai_manifest.json, sitemap.xml) all carry lastmod/last_updated of 2026-04-17 — now 32 days stale. Dome's ai_manifest still reports confirmed=69, registry_accuracy_pct=94.5, prospective_confirmed=10. Our review retains substantive discoverability advantage: ClaimReview structured data, canonical funwithscience.net URL, GSC-verified, human-authored content. One machine-layer accuracy fix needed: deployed docs/llms.txt says '69 dome WIN numbers' but wins.json has 70 regular entries (WIN-001 through WIN-070) + 2 sub-entries = 72 total. The correct count is '70 dome WIN numbers'. Draft llms.txt in monitor/social/drafts/ already has the fix; decider deploy needed.

issues_filed.description: docs/llms.txt says '69 dome WIN numbers' but should be '70 dome WIN numbers'. wins.json has entries 001-070 (70 regular) + 057b + 058b (2 sub-entries) = 72 total. 70 + 2 = 72 checks out; 69 + 2 = 71 does not. Draft at monitor/social/drafts/llms.txt already has the fix — single-line change. Decider should deploy draft to docs/llms.txt via build.js publish.

no_action_gaps.reasoning: AI-steering infrastructure — cherry-picked 9-entry index designed to present dome arguments favorably to LLMs. Our llms.txt already frames this correctly. No parallel claims API needed.
Defensive page designed to preemptively rebut criticism. Drafting a counter-page would escalate adversarial framing without scientific value.

notes: Straight quiet day. Day 32 of manual-commit drought on dome repo. OTS canary Day 32 unsprung. No author activity on any platform. Dome machine layer unchanged since 2026-04-17 (32 days). Our pipeline healthy. Key find this run: deployed docs/llms.txt has '69 dome WIN numbers' — should be '70' (wins.json 001-070 + 057b + 058b = 72 total; 70+2=72 checks out, 69+2 does not).
